name: Beans Mixed Calico Salad w/ Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and drain the kidney, green, and wax beans.
2. Add chopped pepper and onion to a large bowl with the cooked beans.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together sugar, salad oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper until combined.
4. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to coat all ingredients evenly.
5. Chill the salad before serving.
